MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-02-2005 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 612

DISCOVERY 612, APPEARANCE FOR PLAINTIFF. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANTS' DISCOVERY RESPONSES AND TO DEEM MATTERS ADMITTED IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. THE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS SERVED UPON DEFENDANT BY PLAINTIFF ARE DEEMED ADMITTED. DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO RESPOND TO PLAINTIFF'S INTERROGATORIES AND INSPECTION DEMAND WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
ORDER DEEMING REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION (1)ADMITTED AS TO DEFENDANT AND (2)GRANTING MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANT TO RESPOND TO INTERROGATORIES AND INSPECTION DEMAND

calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar May-09-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Ronald Schivo, Sr., Esq., of Zacks, Utrecht & Leadbetter, 415-956-8100 for plaintiff and moving party, Andrea Leung.

RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING:
PLAINTIFF ANDREA LEUNG'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED. Order and Judgment signed. (301/JLW) Reporter: CHRISTINA PAXTON CSR#1558

MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY/RESPONSE TO DISCOVERY
Off Calendar May-02-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearance:
Fredrick Emilson, appearing for Plaintiff and moving party.
No appearance for defendant.
Ruling:
Tentative Ruling adopted: Tentative Ruling adopted: Plaintiff's Motion To Compel Defendants' Discovery Responses And To Deem Matters Admitted is granted. No opposition has been filed. The Requests for Admissions served upon Defendant by Plaintiff are deemed admitted. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond to Plaintiff's interrogatories and inspection demand within 15 days of notice of this order. Order signed in open court. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
